# AGENTS.md

This file applies to `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`.

## What this folder is
- This folder holds templates for bug reports and feature requests.
- It shapes how humans describe problems to the project.

## When editing here
- Keep forms beginner-friendly and short.
- Ask only for information that helps reproduce, triage, or prioritize.

## Keep these rules true
- Templates should guide, not overwhelm.
- Use plain language and clear labels.
